## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Tests cover new runtime or report behavior
- [ ] No API keys, private prompts, personal data, or machine-specific paths are committed
- [ ] Benchmark claims include raw receipts and follow `docs/BENCHMARKING.md`

## Benchmark impact

State whether this changes prompts, routing, scoring, pricing, latency, token usage, or published results. Use “none” when it does not.
